entries.note: V65-A reuses the shipped V64 local writable lineage and the released V48-E worker topology lineage by default.
V65-A instantiates one delegated export packet only and still defers reconciliation, dispatch widening, and broader worker execution semantics.
Shipped V64-C advisory hardening remains shaping-only drift-guard context and does not become export entitlement in V65-A.
V65-A requires one explicit released worker carrier basis and one explicit selected worker topology basis with no fan-out or alternate topology widening.
The delegated export packet remains replayable only when the same shipped V60 continuation basis and the same shipped V61 communication basis where relevant are preserved.
V65-A preserves the shipped local_write/create_new mutation subset and does not backdoor append, overwrite, rename, or delete semantics through worker form.
Dispatch, execute, multi-worker, connector, and remote-operator authority remain deferred beyond V65-A.
